annotations.description: Category B (rate-limit relief): Meraki's /organizations/{orgId}/devices/uplinksLossAndLatency endpoint already returns a timeseries, but a 5-minute window per call and every dashboard view pays the API cost. Recording centralises the fetch on a single evaluation interval so panels read from Prometheus instead. Series labelled by serial + uplink.
annotations.summary: WAN uplink loss + latency recorded for Meraki org 987654
